posts.text: I've lost the ability to swing an iron bc my yips are so bad. Just played 9 without hitting a single iron shot and I think I'm reinventing golf. When you see tour pros hitting a quarter swing bump and run hybrid from 130 out, think of me.

We talked with @BharatRamamurti and @AnuraagRoutray about this on the podcast. They propose a lot of very common sense regulations that I think make a lot of sense and dont wander into moralizing. Take a listen. podcasts.apple.com/us/podcas…

but it’s aligned more w a class bound/coastal college graduate morality that’s very lightly felt but passionately argued. You can get mad at me and hop around and say ‘BUT WHAT ABOUT THE KIDS’ but really the questions should just be about making the books fair which is boring.

Feels very c Dolores Tucker right now especially since the anti-gambling consensus among the media is so robust. There needs to be regulation all the way up to banning a lot of prop bets, etc but this kinda feels like one of those things where there’s a lot of bluster…

I think this is well written but the gap between the media and normies on this issue is extremely wide. People just want less ads they don’t think sports betting in general is some horrific vice that will destroy young men.


McKay Coppins (@mckaycoppins)

Last year, The Atlantic gave me $10K to gamble with. What started as a journalistic gimmick turned into something more... unnerving. 

My cover story on the online betting boom warping sports, culture, politics, and the psyches of millions of

John Frankensteiner (@JFrankensteiner)

For those of you not watching the World Baseball Classic, Team Italy celebrates homeruns by serving the homerun hitter a shot of espresso, and then everyone on the team gives him a kiss on each cheek, and I thought everyone should know such beauty still exists in the world



— https://nitter.net/JFrankensteiner/status/2031920965370695730#m

NBA so wild bc there’s probably 5 people on earth who can shoot this pretty and one of them is a bench player on the worst team in the league.


Sacramento Kings (@SacramentoKings)

MCBUCKETS 🔥

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/SacramentoKings/status/2031920392474931628#m
It’s DC put a giant George Washington head on the corner of the stadium and like a chili bowl somewhere. Maybe a hall of animatronic ex presidents. Why must we be so ‘clean’

I get it but it looks pretty sterile and boring. Someone should write ‘learning from Las Vegas 2’ about what happened post Aria where all the new casinos are so fucking boring and sterile even if they’re ‘nice.’ This looks like the resorts world of stadiums


Nicki Jhabvala (@NickiJhabvala)

The Commanders released more renderings of their planned stadium in D.C.











— https://nitter.net/NickiJhabvala/status/2031839430013550846#m
LETS GOOOOO LEVERKUSEN. MAKE THIS HILARIOUS
Arsenal's FA Cup and CL draw and City's general cowardice feel like the biggest set-up ever. Today, we are all Leverkusen.

Kobe stans yelling at me, I'm sitting in a hallway waiting for my kid to get out of something called 'math circle.' you've never met a more bored person in your entire life and I will reply to every single one of you.
what was Bam's defensive RAPTOR for this game? Oh you don't know or don't care? Maybe you don't know ball like I do.
Thank god. The 81 point Kobe game was the most overrated and over talked-about feat in the NBA. Now we don’t have to discuss it anymore

There is still virtue in saying racism is bad. There is also virtue in ignoring silly shit. Some of you are just the most annoying word cops. Don’t say this don’t say that meanwhile all you do is whine and have bad posture and sneer. Terrible life.

One thing I’ve noticed is there are some explainer dudes here who seem to hunt down posts where some minority is talking about racism and do a very performative ‘SIGH…WE DONT DO THAT ANYMORE’ or ‘LETS NOT DO 2020 AGAIN…’ listen I promise I hate idpol more than you but shut up.
